'''Dom Pricina''' was a wealthy [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]]. She had in her possession the [[Ankarres Sapphire]], and charged people dearly to make use of its supposed healing powers. She was fond of rich foods, and had dessert courses with every meal, and as a result was quite obese.<ref name="Tale" />

==Biography==
Sometime before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Pricina was traveling on the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']]. While on board, she kept carelessly misplacing priceless articles of jewelry. It was her forgetfulness that convinced the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]]—who worked as a valet on the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]]— that Humans were incompetent and didn't deserve their valuables. He stole the [[Ankarres Sapphire|sapphire]] from her and began a life of crime.<ref name="Tale" />
